flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Wayne County Community College District are 22% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($29.1k vs $37.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Wayne County Community College District fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (9.0k → 7.4k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Wayne County Community College District fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (64.0% → 54.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Wayne County Community College District fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0% → 0.0%).
